com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl

Class PlatformBinaryDataDeserializer

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl.PlatformBinaryDataDeserializer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DataDeserializer

    public class PlatformBinaryDataDeserializer
extends java.lang.Object
implements DataDeserializer

    read defined Binary type data(stream) from InputStream in nexacro platform, and transform to PlatformData.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PlatformBinaryDataDeserializer()
      basic creator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected int columnTypeToDataType(short type)
      Transform input column type to X-API data type.
      protected int[] getColumnIndexes(DataSet ds)
      Range DataSet columns by the Identifier(name) and return location(index).
      protected int[] getSourceDataTypes(DataSet ds, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
      Return data type(dataType) before DataSet columns transformation.
      protected PlatformData read(java.io.InputStream in, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to PlatformData.
      protected byte[] readBytes(java.io.DataInputStream in, int count)
      Receive byte array input.
      protected void readConstantColumnHeaders(java.io.DataInputStream in, DataSet ds)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to ColumnHeader with constant value.
      PlatformData readData(java.io.InputStream in, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Read Binary type data(stream) from InputStream, and transform to PlatformData.
      PlatformData readData(java.io.Reader in, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Read Binary type data(stream) from Reader, and transform to PlatformData.
      protected void readDataRows(java.io.DataInputStream in, DataSet ds, int[] dataTypes)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to rows.
      protected void readDataSet(java.io.DataInputStream in, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, int index)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to DataSet.
      protected void readDefaultColumnHeaders(java.io.DataInputStream in, DataSet ds)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to general ColumnHeader.
      protected int readLength(java.io.DataInputStream in)
      Receive length input.
      protected java.lang.Object readValue(java.io.DataInputStream in)
      Receive Variant data input.
      protected java.lang.Object readValue(java.io.DataInputStream in, short type)
      Receive Variant data input.
      protected void readValueToFile(java.io.DataInputStream in, java.io.File file)
      Output Variant data as file.
      protected void readValueToFile(java.io.DataInputStream in, short type, java.io.File file)
      Output Variant data as file.
      protected void readVariable(java.io.DataInputStream in, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, int index)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to Variable.
      protected void readVariableList(java.io.DataInputStream in, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
      Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to VariableList.
      void setProperty(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Set property value.
      protected int variantTypeToDataType(short type)
      Transform input Variant type to X-API data type.

        basic creator.

      • setProperty

                        java.lang.Object value)
        Set property value.
        Specified by:
        setProperty in interface DataDeserializer

        value - property value

      • readData

        public PlatformData readData(java.io.InputStream in,
                             DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                             java.lang.String charset)
                      throws PlatformException
        Read Binary type data(stream) from InputStream, and transform to PlatformData.
        Specified by:
        readData in interface DataDeserializer
        Parameters:
        in - InputStream
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Returns:
        PlatformData
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • readData

        public PlatformData readData(java.io.Reader in,
                             DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                             java.lang.String charset)
                      throws PlatformException
        Read Binary type data(stream) from Reader, and transform to PlatformData. However, in case of Binary type, Reader input is unprovided.
        Specified by:
        readData in interface DataDeserializer
        Parameters:
        in - Reader
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Returns:
        PlatformData
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • read

        protected PlatformData read(java.io.InputStream in,
                            DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to PlatformData. Internally summoned method order is as below.
        Order Method Detail
        1 readVariableList(DataInputStream, PlatformData, DataTypeChanger) VariableList input
        2 readDataSet(DataInputStream, PlatformData, DataTypeChanger) DataSet input
        Parameters:
        in - InputStream
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        Returns:
        PlatformData
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • readVariableList

        protected void readVariableList(java.io.DataInputStream in,
                                PlatformData data,
                                DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
                         throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to VariableList.
        Parameters:
        in - DataInputStream
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • readVariable

        protected void readVariable(java.io.DataInputStream in,
                            PlatformData data,
                            DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                            int index)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to Variable.
        Parameters:
        in - DataInputStream
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        index - location
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • readDataSet

        protected void readDataSet(java.io.DataInputStream in,
                           PlatformData data,
                           DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                           int index)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to DataSet. Internally summoned method order is as below.
        Order Method Detail
        1 readConstantColumnHeaders(DataInputStream, DataSet) input ColumnHeader with constant value
        2 readDefaultColumnHeaders(DataInputStream, DataSet) Input ordinary ColumnHeader
        3 readDataRows(DataInputStream, DataSet, int[]) Input DataSet rows
        Parameters:
        in - DataInputStream
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        index - location
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • readDefaultColumnHeaders

        protected void readDefaultColumnHeaders(java.io.DataInputStream in,
                                        DataSet ds)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to general ColumnHeader.
        Parameters:
        in - DataInputStream
        ds - DataSet
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • readConstantColumnHeaders

        protected void readConstantColumnHeaders(java.io.DataInputStream in,
                                         DataSet ds)
                                  throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to ColumnHeader with constant value.
        Parameters:
        in - DataInputStream
        ds - DataSet
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

                            DataSet ds,
                            int[] dataTypes)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Read Binary type data(stream), and transform to rows.
        Parameters:
        in - DataInputStream
        ds - DataSet
        dataTypes - DataSet columns data type before transformation
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
